ITitlePlayersListItem

ITitlePlayersListItem implements the player information interface to the Xbox Drop-in UI Players feature.

The Players feature calls methods on the interface to obtain information from the title about players displayed in the players list. Titles must provide their own implementation of ITitlePlayersListItem. Refer to the UIXPlayers Sample for an example implementation.

ITitlePlayersListItem instances are added to and removed from the players list with the ILivePlayersList::RegisterPlayer and ILivePlayersList::UnregisterPlayer methods.

Method Description
Compare Compares two ITitlePlayersListItem instances to determine sort order within the players list.
GetBitflags Returns a DWORD bitmask representing title-specific flags associated with the player.
GetName Returns the display name for a player as it should appear in the players list.
GetVoiceStatus Returns the voice capabilities of the player.
GetXUID Returns the XUID associated with the player.
IsTalking Indicates whether the player is currently talking (sending voice packets this frame).

Requirements

Header: Declared in Uix.h.

Import Library: Use Uix.lib.
